com.atakmap.android.gui.PanCheckBoxPrefe.android:title: Enable SA Relay
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanCheckBoxPrefe.android:summary: Re-broadcast inbound network positions over radio to off-grid users. Throttled to one update per contact per 30 seconds.

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanCheckBoxPrefe.android:title: Enable RF to TAK Uplink Relay
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanCheckBoxPrefe.android:summary: When SA Relay is enabled, forward inbound RF CoT to TAK network. Use with care to avoid unintended rebroadcast loops.

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanCheckBoxPrefe.android:title: Send Ping Reply
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanCheckBoxPrefe.android:summary: Automatically reply to incoming pings with your position

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanCheckBoxPrefe.android:title: Ping Reply on Same Transport
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanCheckBoxPrefe.android:summary: Reply on Mesh if ping arrived on Mesh; on UV-PRO radio if ping arrived on radio

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanListPreferenc.android:title: Retry Interval
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanListPreferenc.android:summary: How long to wait before retransmitting an unacknowledged message

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanListPreferenc.android:title: Max Retries
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanListPreferenc.android:summary: Number of retransmit attempts before declaring delivery failure

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanEditTextPrefe.android:title: FCC Call Sign
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanEditTextPrefe.android:summary: Ham radio call (required for APRS TX when armed)

Preference.android:title: APRS icon
Preference.android:summary: Map symbol for your position beacons

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanEditTextPrefe.android:title: APRS message
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanEditTextPrefe.android:summary: Comment text appended to position reports

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanCheckBoxPrefe.android:title: Enable Encryption
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanCheckBoxPrefe.android:summary: Encrypt all data sent over radio

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanEditTextPrefe.android:title: Encryption shared secret
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanEditTextPrefe.android:summary: Same value on every radio that uses RF encryption

Preference.android:title: For Team Leadership ONLY
Preference.android:summary: Do not use unless directed by higher

Preference.android:title: Mesh Beacon — national activation only
Preference.android:summary: Do not use unless directed by your team leader

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanCheckBoxPrefe.android:title: Enable administrative settings
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanCheckBoxPrefe.android:summary: Unlock slot assignment controls for net leadership

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanEditTextPrefe.android:title: Slot time
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanEditTextPrefe.android:summary: Seconds between slot start times (default 2.5 s)

Preference.android:title: Distribute to net
Preference.android:summary: Ensure all stations are in radio range to receive slot assignments
